---
title: About organizers
---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/andrea.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Andrea González Sánchez**  
[keywords]
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/anna.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
Anna Palmann
[keywords]
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/babajide.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
Babajide Owoyele
[keywords]
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/davide.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Davide Ahmar**
Topics: social neurocognition, hyperscanning, multimodal recordings, virtual reality, cognitive neuroscience.
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/james.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**James Trujillo**
Topics: multimodal communication, neurodiversity, virtual/artificial agents, embodied cognitive science, python, open science
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/marijn.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
Marijn Hafkamp
[keywords]
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/sharjeel.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Sharjeel Ahmed Shaikh**
Topics: pose estimation, gesture detection (envisionhgdetector), privacy-enabled data sharing
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/sarka.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Šárka Kadavá**
Topics: multimodal communication, pose estimation, physical effort, signal processing, Python, reproducibility
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/tifanny.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Tifanny Matej Hrkalović**
Topics: social signal processing, human-AI interaction, social cognition, Python, person perceptions
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/travis.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
**Travis Wiltshire**
Topics: complex systems theory and methods, collective cognition, coordination dynamics, synchrony, R, open science
:::

::: {.g-col-2}
![](../images/wim.webp){fig-align="left"}
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
Wim Pouw
Topics: multimodal coordination, movement science, (radical) embodied cognitive science, R, Python, open science, EnvisionBox
:::


:::
